tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c (6.1%), indicating impaired glucose regulation or possible diabetes, despite a low fasting glucose (68.6 mg/dL), which may suggest recent hypoglycemia or tight glycemic control. LDL cholesterol is elevated (116.6 mg/dL), increasing cardiovascular risk. Renal function, electrolytes, and other lipid parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of glycemic control and lipid management.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Vecchio di Montebelluna
